articles.title: FIGHT WEEK! UFC 329: McGregor vs Holloway 2 PREVIEW w/ FIGHT DISCIPLES
articles.description: 'McGregor’s GREATEST Comeback?!' Michael Bisping is joined by Adam Catterall and Nick Peet of the Fight Disciples in Las Vegas for UFC 329 International Fight Week, breaking down a stacked card from top to bottom. The lads preview Conor McGregor’s long-awaited return against Max Holloway, 13 years after their first meeting, and debate whether McGregor can still produce one of the greatest comeback wins in UFC history after five years away from the sport. They also dive into Paddy Pimblett vs Benoit Saint Denis, the hype around Olympic gold medalist Gable Steveson’s UFC debut, the madness of Bobby Green vs Terrance McKinney, Luke Riley’s big Las Vegas moment, and much more from fight week. Subscribe for more UFC 329 coverage, fighter interviews, previews, reactions and breakdowns throughout International Fight Week. articles.title: 'MEET THE NEW UFC SUPERSTAR!' | Gable Steveson EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW | UFC 329
articles.description: Use code BISPING for 15% off Rugiet Ready: https://www.rugiet.com/bisping Michael Bisping sits down with Olympic gold medalist Gable Steveson ahead of his next fight to talk about the huge hype around his UFC arrival, his wrestling background, why he believes he is ready for the heavyweight division, and how quickly he wants to start facing bigger names. Gable talks about learning on the job in MMA, expecting a first-round finish, potentially fighting Tom Aspinall or Ciryl Gane one day, his thoughts on Alex Pereira’s move to heavyweight, training with Jon Jones, his brief time with the Buffalo Bills, and whether a matchup with Josh Hokit could happen next. Subscribe for more UFC interviews, fight breakdowns and reactions from Michael Bisping. #GableSteveson #MichaelBisping #UFC #MMA #UFCHheavyweight #TomAspinall #CirylGane #AlexPereira #JonJones #JoshHokit #UFCInterview

articles.title: 'I will FINISH PADDY!' | Benoit Saint Denis EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW | UFC 329
articles.description: Use code BISPING for 15% off Rugiet Ready: https://www.rugiet.com/bisping Michael Bisping sits down with Benoit Saint-Denis ahead of his massive lightweight clash with Paddy Pimblett to talk about the matchup, the lack of trash talk so far, and why he believes fight night will come down to who can impose their will first. BSD breaks down Paddy’s biggest strengths, including his grappling, submissions, toughness and well-rounded game, while also discussing the lessons learned from his past fights, his confidence heading into Saturday night, and whether a win could put him right in the title conversation. They also discuss Ilia Topuria’s loss to Justin Gaethje, the wild French fanbase, the England vs France storyline, and how Saint-Denis expects to get the job done against Paddy Pimblett. Don’t forget to like, subscribe and turn on notifications for more UFC interviews, fight breakdowns and reactions. #UFC #BenoitSaintDenis #PaddyPimblett #MichaelBisping #IliaTopuria #JustinGaethje #MMA #UFC329 #BSD #PaddyTheBaddy

articles.title: 'Ilia Topuria is a B!#@%' | Paddy Pimblett EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW | UFC 329
articles.description: Try Zapply with code BISPING15 for 15% off your first order at https://us.tryzapply.com/discount/BISPING15?redirect=%2Fcollections%2Fall Michael Bisping sits down with Paddy “The Baddy” Pimblett ahead of his huge fight with Benoit Saint-Denis to talk about bouncing back from the Justin Gaethje war, what went wrong last time out, and why he believes he’ll get the job done fast this weekend. Paddy also gives his honest thoughts on Ilia Topuria, why he thinks a fight between them is inevitable, whether Topuria can come back from defeat, Conor McGregor vs Max Holloway, a possible McGregor move to 170, and much more from the lightweight division. articles.title: BISPING picks UFC 329: McGregor vs Holloway 2 | FINAL PREDICTIONS
articles.description: Use code BISPING for 15% off Rugiet Ready: https://www.rugiet.com/bisping Michael Bisping gives his full card picks and predictions for UFC 329: McGregor vs Holloway 2. The Count breaks down Conor McGregor’s long-awaited return against Max Holloway, Benoit Saint Denis vs Paddy Pimblett, Cory Sandhagen vs Mario Bautista, Lone’er Kavanagh vs Brandon Royval, King Green vs Terrance McKinney, Robert Whittaker vs Nikita Krylov, Gable Steveson vs Elisha Ellison, Adrian Yanez vs Cody Garbrandt, Luke Riley vs Kai Kamaka III, Wang Cong vs Tracy Cortez and Damian Pinas vs Cesar Almeida. Who are you picking at UFC 329? Let us know in the comments. Stay tuned for the Conor McGregor vs Max Holloway 2 and Benoit Saint Denis vs Paddy Pimblett predictions tomorrow. articles.title: Conor McGregor Is Playing With FIRE vs Max Holloway! | UFC 329
articles.description: Conor McGregor is finally set to return after five years away from the UFC, but he is not getting an easy comeback fight. Michael Bisping breaks down Conor McGregor vs Max Holloway, the danger Max brings over five rounds, Conor’s first-round knockout threat, the long layoff, the move to 170lbs and whether McGregor can still shock the world after years away from competition.
